changelog:
- Added first-run setup wizard (Cloud / Light / Heavy selection)
- Added distro selection step with auto-detection from /etc/os-release
- Added hardware scanner (lspci, lsusb, lsmod, dmesg, DKMS, nvidia-smi)
- Added daemoniq hardware command
- Added deep driver knowledge (GPU, Wi-Fi, audio, DKMS, Secure Boot, firmware)
- Added version control system (daemoniq version, update, rollback)
- Added daemoniq uninstall command for clean self-removal
- Simplified installer — silent install, one optional prompt
- Connected update system to JayRaj21/DaemonIQ on GitHub
- Fixed NameError: import os missing before hardware snapshot definition
